e2_sentence: The  Prophet further added, "It would not please us to have them with us.

e1_sentence: The Prophet delivered a sermon and said, "Zaid took the flag and was martyred,  and then Ja'far took the flag and was martyred, and then 'Abdullah bin Rawaha  took the flag and was martyred too, and then Khalid bin Al-Walid took the flag  though he was not appointed as a commander and Allah made him victorious.
